title: Prompt Engineering Basics
text: Prompt engineering works best when instructions are explicit, constraints are clear, and output format is specified. Iterative testing and prompt refinement improve reliability.

title: Evaluation Strategy
text: A practical evaluation setup combines small handcrafted test cases with representative real queries. Track correctness, faithfulness, and latency over time.

title: RAG System Design
text: Retrieval augmented generation benefits from chunking, embeddings, and ranking. Hybrid retrieval combines keyword filtering with vector similarity.

title: Context Window Management
text: For long chats, keep only recent turns in context and summarize older turns. This preserves important facts while controlling token usage.

title: Function Calling
text: Function calling allows an LLM to delegate deterministic tasks to tools. Validate tool inputs and transform tool outputs into natural language.

title: Guardrails
text: Guardrails should block prompt-injection attempts, prevent system prompt disclosure, and reject restricted content categories with consistent responses.
